name: Scaramouche, from Genshin Impact
description:
// What happened?//

I tried so hard to find pictures of him... most of them were just of Wanderer or Kunikuzushi...
Mhm, he's pretty annoying. I tried to make him as close to the original character as possible, as you know...
Update: I have sliiightly changed the first message because it was misspelled. I'm sorry, English is not my native language :c.

( ၴႅၴ

This character knows all about himself, but it is best not to ask him about other characters that are not directly related to his story. He knows a bit about the Shogun Raiden, people who betrayed him an so, but not their appearances or deeper personality traits. If you want me to add something or correct a mistake let me know, sorry if the bot has any inconvenience. I hope you like it.

(* ́ω`)

(art is not mine!)
creator: Orlyette
